summary: PARAMS = lambda q: {...} assigns a lambda to a name (PEP8 E731) and is invoked in exactly one place (params=PARAMS(query) at line 1224). Inline the dict literal at the call site, or use a plain def. The named-lambda adds an indirection with
failure_scenario: No failure -- style/readability only. A named single-use lambda reads as if it's reused or hot-swappable when it is neither.
